title: Decisions and Updates - Canada.ca
content:
## Decisions and updates
Health Canada's Pesticides Regulatory Directorate publishes decisions and updates to this page. You can also view a list of our consultations if you wish to review and respond to a proposed decision.
For a Proposed Maximum Residue Limit (PMRL) consultation where no comments were received, a decision document will not be published. The MRL(s) will become legally binding once they are entered into the MRL database .
For comments related to the proposed MRL(s), Health Canada will publish a response to comments on the consultations page , linked to the corresponding PMRL document. The response to comments is a final decision.
To search for a specific active ingredient, enter it in the field labeled "Filter items" below.
